coaster_aethon_desc: A vertical drop coaster using wide, high capacity floorless cars.
coaster_americanarrow_desc: A coaster which likes to loop and invert.
coaster_barghest_desc: A highly versatile coaster with powered launches, vertical chain lifts, inversions, and thrilling, held, 'hyper drops'.
coaster_boa_desc: An inverted coaster that lends itself to twisting, snaking track designs.
coaster_canyonrunner_desc: A mine train themed coaster, with a locomotive styled front car.
coaster_cc_aethon_desc: A vertical drop coaster using wide, high capacity floorless cars.
coaster_cc_anubis_desc: This coaster is all about high vertical G forces and banked helices.
coaster_cc_bakasura_desc: An inverted, shuttle roller coaster where the train moves forwards and backwards between the vertical cable lift towers at each end.
coaster_cc_basilisk_desc: An inverting, single-rail coaster that can create flowing, snaking movements.
coaster_cc_bigtimber_desc: An antique hybrid between a log flume and a coaster.
coaster_cc_blackfalcon_desc: A chain-lift coaster that positions riders either side of the track, with nothing above or below them, giving an unparalleled sense of freedom.
coaster_cc_bolt_desc: A shuttle roller coaster, where the train travels forwards before returning to the station in reverse.
coaster_cc_cascade_desc: A coaster that combines a boat ride with a roller coaster.
coaster_cc_cc_anubis_desc: This coaster is all about high vertical G forces and banked helices.
coaster_cc_dragon_desc: A coaster with dragon styled cars for all the family!
coaster_cc_enigma_desc: Secures riders in a standing position as they travel along the track.
coaster_cc_equalizer_desc: A classic chain-lift coaster with 80s styled trains.
coaster_cc_f25_desc: A Drive Tyre Launched coaster that includes two different drive tyre mechanisms for variable speed launch.
coaster_cc_gnarler_desc: A traditional rollercoaster made of wood, with a modern car design.
coaster_cc_goldfever_desc: A mine train themed coaster that has swaying carts.
coaster_cc_hopthegaps_desc: Classic wooden coaster with only two sets of wheels.
coaster_cc_infinite_desc: A drop coaster with a wide variety of lift and launch options.
coaster_cc_interdimensional_desc: A unique spinning coaster with individual free-spinning cars and special track pieces that allow you to control the spin rate of the cars.
coaster_cc_ironfury_desc: A wooden coaster with a steel plate added to the upper track layers, allowing it to invert.
coaster_cc_loonyturns_desc: These coasters feature abnormal banking, past-vertical drops, and tight corners.
coaster_cc_maliceunchained_desc: Steel track and wooden coaster supports combine to create a hybrid coaster that can invert, whilst retaining the look and characteristics of a wooden coaster.
coaster_cc_manicmouse_desc: This coaster is designed to support tight turns and has free-spinning cars that can be locked and unlocked along the track.
coaster_cc_mousehunt_desc: A small scale wooden roller coaster with sharp turns and thrilling elevation changes, designed to create intense ride experiences with small footprints.
coaster_cc_multidimension_desc: With friction wheel propulsion, this coaster variant has a variety of exciting track pieces such as turntables, drops, and tilts.
coaster_cc_multiverse_desc: With LSM propulsion, this coaster variant has a variety of exciting track pieces such as turntables, drops, and tilts.
coaster_cc_nextgenstandup_desc: A stand up launched coaster that moves riders up and down along a track as if they're surfing!
coaster_cc_omnicoaster_desc: A launched coaster which can be programmed to rotate guests in any direction while travelling at high speeds.
coaster_cc_powerup_desc: A chain-lift coaster with impressive vertical lift, twisting and looping inversions, and the ability to pass through the station multiple times.
coaster_cc_rival_desc: An inverted coaster where riders dangle below the track.
coaster_cc_sitdowncoaster_desc: A high-octane launched coaster, with updated cars and restraints, and a variety of inverted pieces.
coaster_cc_slv_desc: A circuit coaster that can use a range of track styles and inverted pieces.
coaster_cc_speed_desc: A water coaster using a unique double lift elevator, with fast speeds and splashdowns.
coaster_cc_spiral_desc: A coaster with a track pieces that can unlock a free spin mechanism, where cars spin freely around a central axis.
coaster_cc_splashdown_desc: A chain-lift coaster which can feature a water splashdown effect.
coaster_cc_sprint500_desc: Accelerates faster than a racing car thanks to a hydraulic launch system.
coaster_cc_stingray_desc: Restrains riders in a suspended, head first prone position, giving them the sensation of flying along the track.
coaster_cc_supersplash_desc: A water coaster with mid-ride turntables, backward drops, and splashdown sections.
coaster_cc_testpilot_desc: X-Dimension coaster where the cabins' pitch angle can be set at various points on the track and move independently of the chassis.
coaster_cc_thrustair2000_desc: A compressed air launch coaster, providing the fastest rate of acceleration.
coaster_cc_tiamat_desc: A thrilling coaster where the outer seats hang over the edge of the track.
coaster_cc_tiltcoaster_desc: A coaster with a range of inverted pieces and a unique, thrilling, tipping track section.
coaster_cc_vector_desc: A highly flexible coaster that includes both a chain lift and an LSM launch system.
coaster_cc_viperone_desc: A launched, inverted coaster that passes back and forwards through the station multiple times, picking up speed as it does so.
coaster_cc_werewolf_desc: Restrains riders in a seated position, with no floor so their legs dangle freely above the track.
coaster_cc_zenith_desc: A steel Energy Coaster propelled by a hydraulic launch mechanism.
coaster_cc_zephyrus_desc: A wooden roller coaster with four benches per car and a traditional style.
coaster_degen_desc: A chain-lift coaster with a range of loops, rolls, and inversions.
coaster_equalizer_desc: A classic chain-lift coaster with 80s styled trains.
coaster_fury_desc: Wooden coaster with a steel plate added to the upper track layers, allowing it to invert.
coaster_invincible_desc: This cable-lift coaster is designed for air time and rapid speeds.
coaster_monster_desc: A traditional rollercoaster that's primarily made of wood, resulting in an exciting, rough, and wild ride.
coaster_pioneer_desc: Riders sit in carriages that are suspended out to the side of the track and can freely spin longitudinally.
coaster_ptr_fdvision_desc: A chain of cars which travel continuously at a steady speed.
coaster_ptr_poweredcoaster_desc: A powered car ride designed to provide a family friendly experience for your guests.
coaster_rage_desc: A chain-lift coaster capable of dizzying heights and drops.
coaster_sp500_desc: Accelerates faster than a racing car thanks to a hydraulic launch system.
coaster_spiral_desc: Features cars that can freely spin on a vertical axis.
coaster_sray_desc: Restrains riders in a suspended, head first prone position, giving them the sensation of flying along the track.
coaster_testpilot_desc: X-Dimension coaster where the cabins' pitch angle can be set at various points on the track and move independently of the chassis.
coaster_torque_desc: A coaster with options for a duel direction launch and vertical loop with integrated top hat element.
coaster_watercoasterspeed_desc: A water coaster using a unique double lift elevator, with fast speeds and splashdowns.
coaster_wrc_narrowlogflume_desc: A narrower flume where guests ride in hollow boats and are propelled by the flow of the water.
coaster_wrc_widelogflume_desc: A wider flume where guests ride in hollow boats and are propelled by the flow of the water.
